form.name: Name
form.description_placeholder: Briefly describe what this project can do
form.instructions_placeholder: Ex: Explain how the project should behave and respond
form.instructions_hint: Be specific about the tone, expertise level, and response format you want.
form.conversation_starters_placeholder: Add example prompts users can start with
form.knowledge_hint: Conversations with your GPT can potentially reveal part or all of the files uploaded.
form.files_pending: Files will be uploaded after the GPT is created
form.premium_hint: Premium models consume more credits per message
form.reasoning_effort_hint: Controls how much time the model spends reasoning before responding. Higher effort = more thorough analysis but slower and more expensive.
form.show_reasoning_hint: Display the AI's reasoning steps during response generation (for supported models like Gemini 2.5)

toast.gpt_created_with_files: GPT created successfully with {count} file(s) uploaded
toast.gpt_created_files_failed: GPT created successfully, but some files failed to upload
toast.files_added: {count} file(s) added. They will be uploaded when you create the GPT.

confirm.delete_gpt: Are you sure you want to delete this GPT? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_file: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
